display.purpose: Hero stats, prominent currency readings, and main counts.

body.purpose: Standard table items, descriptions, labels, and text fields.

shadows.name: premium
shadows.purpose: Soft elevation for property and financial dashboard cards.

shadows.name: cyan-glow
shadows.purpose: Select focus indicator for interactive buttons and fields.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard action trigger for dashboard submissions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #13c8ec; color: #0f172a; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; padding: 10px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0fb1d1; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.96); opacity: 0.8; }

components.name: Dashboard Card
components.description: Metric container with rounded layout and soft shadow.
components.css: .ds-dashboard-card { background: #ffffff; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08); border-radius: 24px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04), 0 4px 10px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02); font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; transition: all 500ms; } .ds-dashboard-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08), 0 8px 20px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04); } .ds-card-title { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-value { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.04em; color: #0f172a; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: The Arctic Vault is a visual metaphor that guides the user interface of IGLOO. It projects security, clarity, and precision through a cool-toned palette, glassmorphic textures, and smooth transitions. The interface feels solid, secure, and reassuring, like a modern digital vault designed to handle critical financial and property details.

rules.name: The Glacier Accent Rule
rules.body: The primary color (#13c8ec) must be used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its role is strictly functional: to draw attention to primary actions, states, or key highlights.

rules.name: The Interaction Lift Rule
rules.body: Shadows are light and ambient at rest. Upon hover, cards lift physically (translateY(-2px)) and their shadow becomes softer and more diffused to indicate clickability.

dos: Do use large rounded corners (24px to 32px) on main dashboard panels.
Do ensure text on Glacier Cyan accents has high contrast (e.g. Slate Main #0f172a).
Do implement a scaling click reaction (active-tap) on all interactive cards.
donts: Don't use warm, saturated cream, sand, or beige backgrounds.
Don't use raw, solid black or bright blue borders; use translucent slate-200/60 or white/5 instead.
Don't pair competing display fonts; maintain Manrope as the single family.
